title: Unlimited Banner Layers
description: Removes the 6 layer limit and makes it up to 16 or whatever you choose!
body:
# Unlimited Banner Layers

The name already explains what this does but basically this mod will add a config file named `unlimitedbannerlayers.json` in the config folder, which will let you specify the max number of layers you will be able to have on banners. The default vanilla limit is 6 and this mod will set it to 16 by default.

This mod can also be configured using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
